system.description: Anti-materiel rifles are large bolt-action rifles designed to punch through heavy armor or structures. They feature an integral bipod and a single round internal magazine. When attacking, the target’s Armor or Protection is treated as if it were 4 points lower. Due to the massive recoil, the gun should be fired from a prone position or mounted. Firing without a fixed position will inflict a -3d penalty on the attack roll and require the shooter to make a Combat save or take a 1/W1 Wound from the blunt force of the recoil. Defenders get no cover bonus when defending against this weapon.
